tb_1773375166_1.title: Strengthen MCC localguys workflow contract with playbook-safe fields
tb_1773375166_1.description: Add explicit write opt-ins, verification target, max_turns, idle nudge template, and stage tool policy to dynamic localguys workflow contracts in MCC.
tb_1773375166_1.result_summary: Dynamic localguys workflow contracts now expose explicit execution_mode, write_opt_ins, verification_target, max_turns, idle_nudge_template, and stage_tool_policy while preserving playground-only sandbox policy.
completion_contract: workflow contract carries explicit playbook-safe execution fields
new contract fields remain playground-only and do not weaken sandbox policy

status_history.reason: contract fields implemented and targeted tests green

tb_1773375166_2.title: Add playbook-grade telemetry to MCC localguys run registry
tb_1773375166_2.description: Extend localguys run storage with recommended tools, filtered schemas, idle turn count, and verification result so MCC can diagnose local-model behavior structurally.
tb_1773375166_2.result_summary: Localguys run registry now stores structured telemetry derived from PATCH metadata and benchmark summary aggregates idle turns, verification pass rate, and tool/schema coverage.
completion_contract: registry stores structured telemetry for localguys runs

status_history.reason: telemetry fields implemented and targeted tests green

tb_1773375166_3.title: Expose MCC localguys contract compliance in UI and task context
tb_1773375166_3.description: Show localguys safety/compliance fields in MiniStats and context packet so users can inspect stage policy, verification target, and sandbox semantics per run.
tb_1773375166_3.result_summary: Task context packet now exposes localguys_compliance, and MiniStats renders sandbox mode, write gates, verification target, max turns, active step tools, and telemetry state for localguys runs.
completion_contract: localguys contract safety fields are inspectable in MCC UI
task context packet includes compliance data needed by downstream consumers

status_history.reason: UI and context compliance exposure started
context packet and MiniStats now expose localguys compliance with builds and targeted tests green

tb_1773294107_1.title: Debug MCC chat send path: message not persisted and model unavailable
tb_1773294107_1.description: Investigate MiniChat/backend send failure where chat shows backend model unavailable and submitted message is not saved.
tb_1773294107_1.result_summary: MiniChat quick path now follows selected model/provider, persists quick history, and returns node_path-backed history for reload.
completion_contract: backend chat request succeeds or clear failure reason rendered

tb_1773333730_1.title: MCC code context inspection overhaul
tb_1773333730_1.description: Make MCC graph/code inspection stop feeling task-shaped and support deep descendant browsing plus direct code viewing.
tb_1773333730_1.result_summary: Added a reusable MCC graph fixture, a seed script that reuses or creates the fixture project, and a browser project_id boot override so Playwright can open a hydrated graph state deterministically.

tb_1773333730_2.title: Hide low-value structural labels in normal MCC graph mode
tb_1773333730_2.description: Remove or humanize labels like struct in normal graph reading mode while keeping debug semantics available.
tb_1773333730_2.result_summary: Normal MCC mode no longer renders low-value structural edge labels as struct; architecture doc now pins fractal descendant scaling at ~1.6 per level.
completion_contract: normal mode no longer shows struct labels

tb_1773333730_3.title: Separate code-scope node projection from task/workflow projection
tb_1773333730_3.description: Introduce explicit visual/semantic contract so directories/files/aggregates do not read like pending tasks.
tb_1773333730_3.result_summary: Code-scope nodes now render with distinct DIR/FILE/ROOT projection, reduced task-like status emphasis, and graphKind-aware styling.
completion_contract: code nodes visually distinct from task nodes

tb_1773333730_4.title: Add deep descendant browsing for code inspection
tb_1773333730_4.description: Support children, grandchildren, and great-grandchildren on demand with breadcrumb-oriented code inspection UX.
tb_1773333730_4.result_summary: Directory browsing now lazy-expands across deeper descendant levels and MiniContext shows breadcrumb-based code inspection header.
completion_contract: deep lazy expand works across multiple levels

tb_1773333730_5.title: Add code-first MiniContext and docked code viewer flow
tb_1773333730_5.description: Reorder MiniContext for file/directory nodes and provide a clearer direct code viewing path.
tb_1773333730_5.result_summary: MiniContext now uses code-first summary/breadcrumbs for file-directory nodes and open-in-pane flow is explicit from linked docs and tree rows.
completion_contract: code nodes open code-first context mode
docked code viewer path is explicit

tb_1773335347_1.title: MCC code viewer and breadcrumb navigation polish
tb_1773335347_1.description: Finish code inspection MVP with fullscreen file viewing and breadcrumb jump navigation from MiniContext.
tb_1773335347_1.result_summary: Code inspection polish completed: fullscreen code viewer path and clickable breadcrumb jump flow are now available from MiniContext.
completion_contract: fullscreen code viewer works from MiniContext

tb_1773335347_2.title: Add fullscreen code viewer path for MiniContext linked docs and file tree
tb_1773335347_2.description: Allow linked docs and file-tree rows to open file content in a fullscreen MCC code viewer, not only pane mode.
tb_1773335347_2.result_summary: MiniContext linked docs and file-tree rows can now open files in pane or fullscreen MCC code viewer.

tb_1773335347_3.title: Add clickable breadcrumb jump navigation for code scope in MiniContext
tb_1773335347_3.description: Make code breadcrumbs clickable so parent and ancestor scopes can be focused/jumped from MiniContext.
tb_1773335347_3.result_summary: MiniContext code breadcrumbs are now clickable and support jump-up navigation to ancestor scopes.

tb_1773335963_1.title: MCC code-scope semantics cleanup
tb_1773335963_1.description: Finish code-node UX so code scopes no longer look like pending tasks and breadcrumb jumps behave like explicit context switches.
tb_1773335963_1.result_summary: Code-scope semantics cleanup completed: code nodes use neutral code-scope semantics and breadcrumb jumps now read as explicit context switches.
completion_contract: code nodes no longer read as pending tasks

tb_1773335963_2.title: Remove pending-task semantics from code scope cards
tb_1773335963_2.description: Neutralize pending-task visuals for DIR/FILE/ROOT nodes and replace them with code-scope semantics.
tb_1773335963_2.result_summary: Code scope cards now render as neutral code inspection surfaces instead of pending-task cards.
completion_contract: code scope cards no longer show task-like pending state

tb_1773335963_3.title: Polish breadcrumb jump as explicit MCC context switch
tb_1773335963_3.description: Make breadcrumb ancestor jumps read as explicit code-scope navigation rather than just generic search focus.
tb_1773335963_3.result_summary: Breadcrumb jump language now uses explicit context-switch wording in MiniContext.
completion_contract: breadcrumb jumps use explicit code-scope language

tb_1773337608_1.title: MCC descendant generation controls
tb_1773337608_1.description: Promote descendant browsing into explicit generation controls so users can traverse children, grandchildren, great-grandchildren, and deeper levels on demand.
tb_1773337608_1.result_summary: Descendant browsing is now first-class: preset generations and deeper on-demand browsing are both available in MiniContext.
completion_contract: deeper on-demand browsing exists beyond great-grandchildren

tb_1773337608_2.title: Add generation presets for children, grandchildren, and great-grandchildren
tb_1773337608_2.description: Expose first-class descendant generation controls in MiniContext for code inspection.
tb_1773337608_2.result_summary: MiniContext now exposes explicit generation presets for children, grandchildren, and great-grandchildren.
completion_contract: MiniContext has explicit generation preset controls
selected generation is visible in UI

tb_1773337608_3.title: Add on-demand deeper descendant browsing beyond great-grandchildren
tb_1773337608_3.description: Allow the user to request deeper descendant levels beyond the first three generations without returning to recursive dump mode.
tb_1773337608_3.result_summary: MiniContext now supports +1 deeper browsing beyond great-grandchildren while preserving lazy generation-based expansion.
completion_contract: tree auto-expands by generation depth without recursive dump

tb_1773339290_1.title: MCC graph descendant chain persistence
tb_1773339290_1.description: Preserve expanded ancestor chain when drilling into child code-scope nodes in roadmap graph.
tb_1773339290_1.result_summary: Roadmap graph drill now preserves expanded ancestor chain while deeper child code-scope nodes unfold.
completion_contract: ancestor stays expanded while child expands

tb_1773339290_2.title: Keep ancestor nodes expanded while child drill deepens
tb_1773339290_2.description: Replace single roadmap drill target with ancestor-preserving chain behavior for code-scope graph inspection.
tb_1773339290_2.result_summary: Double-clicking child code-scope nodes now deepens drill without collapsing their already-expanded ancestors.
completion_contract: ancestor stays expanded while child expands

tb_1773339290_3.title: Add MCC graph chain drill contract tests
tb_1773339290_3.description: Cover parent-child-grandchild drill persistence and explicit collapse semantics.
tb_1773339290_3.result_summary: Added contract tests for roadmap drill chain state, rd-origin resolution, and ancestor-preserving truncation semantics.

tb_1773340126_1.title: Apply cumulative fractal scaling across MCC drill generations
tb_1773340126_1.description: Ensure child, grandchild, and great-grandchild code-scope overlays shrink by cumulative phi-like depth instead of repeating the same local size.

tb_1773340482_1.title: Apply full fractal visual scaling to MCC code-scope drill nodes
tb_1773340482_1.description: Scale code-scope drill nodes by cumulative 1/1.6^n across node size, font sizes, handle sizes, and edge thickness instead of only container size.
tb_1773340482_1.result_summary: Cumulative fractal scaling now applies to code-scope drill node size, font sizes, handles, and inline edge thickness via rd_depth_total.
completion_contract: node, font, handles, and edges shrink cumulatively by depth

tb_1773386401_1.title: Reduce remaining mini-node floors so grandchild scale is visible
tb_1773386401_1.description: Lower the remaining min-width and font-size floors on MCC code-scope mini nodes so grandchildren and great-grandchildren remain visually smaller than daughters.
tb_1773386401_1.result_summary: Lowered the remaining mini-node floors so cumulative 1/1.6 scaling is still visible on grandchildren and great-grandchildren instead of flattening at the same size.

tb_1773391800_1.title: Document MCC generation-band split markers and verification path
tb_1773391800_1.description: Capture the generation-band gap explicitly: one shared mini render family, need for depth1/depth2/depth3+ policy split, geometry scaling, and Playwright verification requirements.
tb_1773391800_1.result_summary: Added explicit generation-band recon markers and a Playwright verification path note so the next visual passes are grounded in the real renderer gap.

tb_1773391800_2.title: Split MCC code-scope visual policy by generation band
tb_1773391800_2.description: Replace one shared mini-node floor with explicit depth1/depth2/depth3+ floors for node size, text, handles, border, and related visual channels.
tb_1773391800_2.result_summary: RoadmapTaskNode now applies separate depth-band floors so daughters, grandchildren, and deeper descendants no longer share one visual clamp family.

tb_1773391800_3.title: Split MCC descendant spacing by generation band
tb_1773391800_3.description: Apply generation-aware xGap and yGap in inline code-scope drill layout so deeper generations read as nested, not flat.
tb_1773391800_3.result_summary: DAGView inline drill layout now scales spacing by cumulative generation depth instead of keeping one flat spacing band for all descendants.

tb_1773391800_4.title: Seed Playwright-friendly MCC graph state for visual regression
tb_1773391800_4.description: Fresh browser sessions open with no project context yet. Add a replay or hydration path so Playwright can verify descendant hierarchy on a real graph state.
completion_contract: browser can open hydrated graph state

tb_1773391800_5.title: Capture Playwright visual regression for MCC descendant hierarchy
tb_1773391800_5.description: Use the seeded MCC graph fixture to run browser-side verification for daughter, grandchild, and deeper generation scaling on a live graph.
completion_contract: visual hierarchy verified on live graph
